mapper.insert: INSERT INTO phone_verification ( id, phone, code, purpose, expires_at, customer_name, benepia_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{phone}, #{code}, #{purpose}, #{expiresAt}, #{customerName}, #{benepiaId}, now() )

INSERT INTO point_voucher ( id, voucher_number, benepia_id, customer_name, phone, channel_id, total_amount, used_amount, remaining_amount, valid_from, valid_until, status, point_tid, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{voucherNumber}, #{benepiaId}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{channelId}, #{totalAmount}, #{usedAmount}, #{remainingAmount}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, 'ACTIVE', #{pointTid}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, voucher_number, benepia_id, customer_name, phone, total_amount, used_amount, remaining_amount, status, valid_from, valid_until FROM point_voucher WHERE voucher_number = #{voucherNumber}

SELECT v.id, v.voucher_number, v.benepia_id, v.customer_name, v.phone, v.total_amount, v.used_amount, v.remaining_amount, v.status, v.valid_from, v.valid_until, v.point_tid, v.channel_id, c.voucher_cancel_days FROM point_voucher v LEFT JOIN channels c ON c.id = v.channel_id WHERE v.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE point_voucher SET status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE point_voucher SET used_amount = used_amount - #{amount}, remaining_amount = remaining_amount + #{amount}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, voucher_number, benepia_id, customer_name, phone, total_amount, used_amount, remaining_amount, valid_from, valid_until, status FROM point_voucher WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( customer_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR benepia_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR voucher_number ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT v.id, v.voucher_number, v.benepia_id, v.customer_name, v.phone, v.total_amount, v.used_amount, v.remaining_amount, v.valid_from, v.valid_until, v.status, ( v.status = 'ACTIVE' AND v.used_amount = 0 AND c.voucher_cancel_days IS NOT NULL AND now() <= v.valid_from + (c.voucher_cancel_days || ' days')::interval ) AS cancelable, CASE WHEN c.voucher_cancel_days IS NOT NULL THEN v.valid_from + (c.voucher_cancel_days || ' days')::interval ELSE NULL END AS cancelDeadline FROM point_voucher v LEFT JOIN channels c ON c.id = v.channel_id WHERE v.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id, u.order_number, o.id AS order_id, u.used_at, u.amount_before, u.used_amount, u.amount_after FROM point_voucher_usage u LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.order_number = u.order_number WHERE u.voucher_id = #{voucherId} ORDER BY u.used_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_voucher_usage ( id, voucher_id, voucher_number, customer_name, benepia_id, order_number, used_at, amount_before, used_amount, amount_after ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{voucherId}, #{voucherNumber}, #{customerName}, #{benepiaId}, #{orderNumber}, now(), #{amountBefore}, #{usedAmount}, #{amountAfter} )
